// Perspective expression — probe for applyPropertyUpdates (page-level + view-level)
//
// Paste into Markdown component props.source (requires escapeHtml: false).
//
// What it probes:
//   Q6: Does page.applyPropertyUpdates exist? Dumps its source.
//       Tries calling with null / [] / [{}] / [{viewMountPath:'x'}] /
//       [{viewMountPath:'x',propUpdates:[]}] and the real view's mountPath.
//       Also tests view.applyPropertyUpdates (the method on the view store itself).
//   Also: page.applyPendingUpdates
//
// If applyPropertyUpdates can be called with arbitrary payloads, it's a way
// to write props without going through the gateway WebSocket round-trip.
//
// Reaches page via window.__client (confirmed 8.3.6 by Probe 1).
// No fiber walk required.



concat(
  '<div id="recon-output" style="font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;background:#0a0a18;color:#88ee88;padding:10px;height:300px;overflow-y:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;border-radius:4px">Running Probe 5...</div>',
  '<img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==" style="display:none" onload="eval(atob(\'\'))">')
